---
title: ""
page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}
<div class="landing">

  <div class="landing-name">
    <div class="landing-en">Yu-You Liou</div>
    <div class="landing-zh">劉昱佑</div>
  </div>

  <div class="landing-footer">
    <p class="landing-tagline">Agricultural &amp; Environmental Economics &nbsp;·&nbsp; Urban &amp; Transportation Economics</p>
    <nav class="landing-nav">
      <a href="https://yyliou.github.io/yyliou/cv/cv.pdf" target="_blank">CV</a>
      <a href="https://yyliou.github.io/yyliou/cv/cv.pdf" target="_blank">CV</a>
      <a href="mailto:d10627008@ntu.edu.tw">Email</a>
      <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=PXyiL0oAAAAJ&hl=zh-TW" target="_blank">Google Scholar</a>
    </nav>
  </div>

</div>
```
